block.domesticationinnovation.pet_bed_wh: Allows pets to respawn on the pet bed.
block.minecraft.dragon_egg.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §d[Ender Dragon]§r in the §dEnd§r
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.answer0: (This man has an extremely powerful aura, he remains silent.)
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.answer2: If you want it, you'll have to take it.
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.answer4: How many times have we fought.
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.option0: Hey, %s, the days you could easily open the portal are over!
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.option3: I had a feeling you’d say that.
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.option4: Hard to say. It's the only memory I have of us since we were kids.
entity.ba_bt.end_golem.tcrcore.option5: Time to finish this! Once for!
entity.dodosmobs.bone_chimera.tcrcore.an: Human? To find this place... did the Resonance Stone guide you here?
I am the mount of the Earth Angel. When the tower's seal descended, the Earth Angel transported me here so the Resonance Stone could find my location.
This body carries an undying curse. If you help me find release, my bones can be forged into a fine weapon. Are you ready?
entity.minecraft.villager.tcrcore.answer: Mambo, mambo, oh my gilly, mambo~
Hakimi nanbei ludou~ Axi ga axi~
Ding dong ji~ Ding dong ji~
entity.minecraft.villager.tcrcore.option: [It seems the local residents are heavily corrupted!]
[Why can't I understand the villagers' language...]
entity.ribbits.ribbit.tcrcore.answer1: If you want to know more, bring lots and lots of amethyst blocks to trade, croak! Need 12, croak!
entity.ribbits.ribbit.tcrcore.answer3: Croak, you call that a offering, croak! I need 12, croak!
entity.ribbits.ribbit.tcrcore.answer4: We were originally humans from the ocean village, cursed by the Black Tide into this form, croak.
entity.ribbits.ribbit.tcrcore.answer5: The ocean tower is very dangerous, croak. For the sake of the amethyst blocks, take these treasures for self-defense, croak!
... (No sign of life, just a corpse)
entity.tcr_bosses.valkyrie.tcrcore.answe: Mortal, did the resonance stone guide you here?
I am %s, ordered to guard [%s] here. For a thousand years, we have never awaited the legendary savior.
%s? Very well then. Bring me ten %s from my subordinates to prove your worth, then we'll see.
entity.tcr_bosses.valkyrie.tcrcore.optio: [You have no destiny to do this.(%s)]
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer-1: %s, you're here! What would you like to do today?
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer-2: Which school would you like to learn?
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer0: %s, you're here! I'm reading the archives of this world
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer1: You've already spoken with that woman? She seems to be the leader here. Looks like to solve the problems here, we'll have to follow her instructions for now.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer111: This is the helmet of the warrior [%s] under the command of the Soul Angel. And from the memory, after Soul Angel %s was eroded by the Black Tide, it possessed [%s]! Let's show this interpreted memory to %s!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer112: Soul Angel, %s, rules the world of the dead. [%s] is the bravest warrior under its command. Cursed by the Black Tide, they are forever trapped together with [%s] in [%s] !
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer13: [%s]? Let me see, another special memory...
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer14: Heh heh, it seems the Soul Angel, who governs the underworld, also mastered the magic of the living!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer15: [%s] gives us two pieces of information. §6First, it depicts most of the monsters in the world eroded by the Black Tide!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer16: §6Second, it records the magic of this world! Heh, the magic here is quite similar to the magic I know!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer17: The scroll depicts spell essences and their corresponding spells. §6Bring me the spell essence described in the compendium, and I will convert it into a corresponding spell scroll for you.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer18: §6Give me your weapon, and I will enchant it with the spell recorded on the scroll! §fI happen to have a scroll here. Go try it out!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer19: %s, looks like you've learned how to enchant weapons! Now, let me teach you how to cast spells! §6Watch closely, I'll only teach this once!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer2: You've heard that woman's story, right? But whether it's true or false, we'll only know once we truly start our journey. Remember what we agreed on before coming here: you have to rely on your own strength to recover your lost memories! Keep it up, I'll always be by your side, your strong support!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer20: When holding an enchanted weapon, press [%s] to cast the corresponding spell. See? Simple, right?
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer21: Casting spells consumes mana. When mana is depleted, you cannot cast spells. §6Note, mana can only be recovered in the Sanctum! Once you leave the Sanctum, I cannot infuse you with magic. §fHowever, there's one more thing...
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer22: One more thing! In case you can't recover mana outside the Sanctum, I've specially prepared [%s] for you! With [%s], you can replenish mana anytime, anywhere!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer23: However, [%s] has limited uses! When it's used up, just use it in the Sanctum, and it will automatically refill! Embark on the path of magic, Sa—vi—or!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer24: %s, is your adventure going well recently?
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer25: I'm worn out from researching materials here too. If it weren't agreed that you'd do it yourself, I'd love to go on an adventure with you.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer28: Nonsense, how could that be? I think you've just been adventuring too hard lately and are seeing things. You should rest more!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer29: Alright, alright, once we return all the Eyes of God, all questions will surely be answered!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer3: Look! My new outfit! Pretty, right? Coming to this world, we should get a new set of clothes too! Here, you should change into yours as well!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer30: Hmm... The archives say that infusing [%s] can activate it and open a portal to [%s]!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer31: §6[%s§6] is a realm between the underworld and the Overworld. Inside [%s§6], we can use summoning altars to meet the Angel of the past.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer32: Maybe we can go in and take a look. Perhaps we can gain their power from the memories!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer33: %s, you seem troubled. What happened in %s?
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer35: So that's why you said before that they all seem to know you...
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer36: Before you know it, only [%s] remains to be returned... Keep it up!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer37: %s, you're here! Or should I call you... what did they call you? Purus!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer38: Treatment is over. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! I'll answer them all!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer39: I am your attending physician, responsible for treating your DID. As for why I look like this, it's because we're in your mental world. Everything here is as you imagine it.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer40: No need to worry. You've already killed them with your own hands. They are dead forever in your dreams. They won't come back.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer41: The Black Tide is actually the effect of the medication Risperdal. We use medication to control the activity of your various personalities. And you, as the kindest, purest personality, we chose you as our breakthrough point. The other personalities were too troublesome, so we could only administer the medication to suppress them when you were in control of the body.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer42: In your mental world, the medication manifests as the 'Black Tide.' It helps us restrain the other personalities. However, in your world, only you can truly affect them. So we fabricated the lie of recreation to guide you, step by step, to eliminate them.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer43: From now on, you can live like a normal person! Of course, whenever you want to return here, just tell me!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer49: ...I respect your choice. Whenever you want to return to reality, you can come find me!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer6: Hmm... Based on the information in the archives and my experience, the Cloudland you entered after touching the altar is likely the merged result of the Angel' original mental worlds, eroded by the Black Tide.
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer7: Yeah, maybe deep within the Cloudland, you can find reflections of the Angel and gain their power!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer8: Try exploring the Cloudland! You might find something significant, maybe even valuable memory essence materials!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.answer9: This is... special memory essence. It seems to record the memories of a group, not just a single life. Let's see what secrets it holds!
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.option15: They all seem to know me
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.option21: About the truth of the Black Tide
entity.tcrcore.aine.tcrcore.option26: No, I want to stay here
entity.tcrcore.chronos_sol.tcrcore.answe: Traveler, is your adventure going well?

A thousand years ago, 'our' world was struck by an unknown calamity from beyond the heavens, and the Black Tide descended upon the realm. Facing the endless Black Tide, 'we' were powerless. Affected by the Black Tide, 'our' memories gradually faded... One by one, They were devoured by the Black Tide, and their souls were sealed away across the world. When 'we' realized that 'our' memories were receding like the tide, 'we' used magic to inscribe the Dead Sea Scrolls, to remind us that a savior would eventually return from beyond the heavens, unite 'our' power, achieve recreation, and vanquish the Black Tide!

The Primordial Sea shields us from the outside world's aura. I cannot sense their locations from here. However, this §6Resonance Stone§f can help you find where the Eyes of the Gods are scattered in the outer world. I give this Resonance Stone to you. Once you reach the Overworld, it will guide you to the Angel' locations. Remember, the Resonance Stone can only be used once per stage! After you retrieve an Eye of God, I can use it to forge a new Resonance Stone.
Traveler, you might first go to the §6[Armory]§f to get a suitable weapon from %s. Once you're ready, head to the harbor to find %s. She will take you to the starting point of your journey.
Traveler, has your journey to find [%s] been successful?
Truly, you are the prophesied savior! Please, place the Eye of God upon the altar!
You can also pray at the goddess statue with the Eye of God. A portion of the Angel's power contained within the Eye will be shared with you through the statue.
The Resonance Stone still needs time to recharge. Please wait, traveler!
The Resonance Stone has finished recharging. Set forth, traveler!
Well done, traveler! Allow me to recharge the Resonance Stone. Please rest awhile!
[%s]? I cannot find any related memories. Please consult the witch and search the archives with her power!
Traveler, the Resonance Stone has not yet finished recharging. Please be patient.

I was the least eroded by the Black Tide. They used their remaining strength to seal me and this Sanctum beneath us into the Primordial Sea, to slow the Black Tide's erosion and await the savior's return. As for who the savior is, or why they possess the power to save us, 'we' have no way of knowing. But in the face of the Black Tide, 'we' can only believe in this ancient memory and believe in the arrival of recreation...
This is... %s?!
In that case, this memory can restore the Resonance Stone's magic prematurely. I will infuse this echo into the Resonance Stone. You must retrieve its spark!
Please place the Eye of God upon the altar! The Angel governing the underworld has, in the end, stepped into the underworld themselves...
Please place the Eye of God upon the altar! You have buried the code of resurrection in the ashes, melting the rusted lock into a flowing golden river…
Traveler, all the Eyes of God scattered in the Overworld have been retrieved. The Resonance Stone may no longer function there. If it doesn't respond, perhaps it's time to try other dimensions.
At the dawn of creation, the world was divided into four dimensions: the Overworld, the Nether, the Aether, and the End. Each was governed by its respective Angel.
After the Black Tide invasion, their souls remained there forever. I used the power of [%s] to forge [%s] for you. Use [%s] to ignite the obsidian frame and open the gate to the Nether!
Traveler, when you are ready, head to the Nether and use the Resonance Stone! Before you go, accept my blessing to protect you from the flames!
Traveler, you've arrived just in time! The witch has made progress researching the echoes of the Ship Graveyard! We must perform the ancient ritual to summon the Death Angel back!
The Angel governing death—%s. According to information left by the Soul Angel in the Ship Graveyard, their soul is imprisoned in the River Styx!

Traveler, are you referring to the witch who has settled here? She seems to possess power from beyond this world, much like yourself. I believe in the prophecy; I believe that you and the witch can save the Sanctum. Everything here will be open to you both!
We must perform the summoning ritual to rescue them from the Styx!
Traveler, did you see [%s] in the Nether? Arrange [%s] in a T-shape, then place three [%s] on top to summon them!
[%s]? This is the essence condensed from the Death Angel's power. It can open the gate to [%s]!
But I lack the power to open [%s] for you. Perhaps you will need the witch's help to activate its magic and open the gate to Samsara.
While the Resonance Stone is recharging, go find %s and examine [%s]!
Cough, traveler, next... cough...
Cough, ever since the Eyes returned to the altars, I feel my power waning... Perhaps the Black Tide's curse is finally reaching me...
On your journey to return the Eyes, only those of the Sky Angel and the Void Angel remain unreturned... With the return of the Death Angel's Eye, the gates of Heaven have opened.

Legend says that after death, the virtuous ascend to Heaven, the wicked descend to the Nether, and those neither good nor evil fade into the Void. The Death Angel and the Soul Angel govern the Styx, arranging the destinations of the departed.
After the Black Tide, the balance of yin and yang was broken. Endless souls pour into the Overworld, unable to enter the cycle of reincarnation.

Since the Black Tide invasion, she has stood guard at the harbor for a thousand years, the only link between this place and the world. She is a puppet 'we' crafted. As 'our' memories faded, so too did her power dwindle.

Set forth, before my power fades completely. §6Water the frame built of glowstone with the source of life to open the gates of Heaven! §fOnce you enter the Aether, use the Resonance Stone to find the location of [%s].
The Aether is perilous. I bestow upon you the blessing of §6[Sword Soaring]§f!
Cough, traveler, you've come. Cough... Was your journey to find [%s] successful?
...(You tell %s about what happened in %s)
So that's it... So the savior in the Dead Sea Scrolls is the Pure Angel... Only purity can sweep away all darkness...
No wonder I always felt you shared our essence, traveler, and could traverse the three realms.
Cough, now only the final step remains... to begin the ritual... The Void Angel's Eye is in the End...
I lack the power to recharge the Resonance Stone. Its remaining energy is only enough to guide you to [%s]... For the rest of the journey, please take care, traveler!
Purus Absolutus.. Purus Absolutus...!
He is a demigod from the Overworld, master of forging and craftsmanship. All the divine weapons and armor used by the Angel were forged by his hand.
Oh, prophesied savior, I have awaited your arrival! Only you can retrieve the Eyes of the Gods and restore the world's former glory!
I am one of the world's ten great Angel, named %s, and I govern time.

At the dawn of creation, ten Angel were born in the Sanctum, governing all things in the world. I am one of them. 'We' often gathered to discuss important matters. When a situation required 'our' intervention, 'we' would choose one among 'us' to go.

Traveler, you must retrieve their anchors—the Eyes of the Gods—and return the souls of the Angel to the altars. Then, I shall offer my own soul, and we can achieve the recreation recorded in the Dead Sea Scrolls!
entity.tcrcore.fake_end_golem.tcrcore.an: The past events... do you truly not remember?
I forged my divinity into %s to avoid the Black Tide's erosion, even though my divine body has long become a decayed puppet...
When you released my divine body just now, I regained part of my power. Purus, this blade was forged by you long ago using the power of purification.
Pity the Black Tide erosion left only a rough embryo. Take it. May it help you sweep away the last of the Black Tide!
Accept it, [%s]. I will wait for you at the world's end!
entity.tcrcore.fake_sky_golem.tcrcore.an: Purus Absolutus! I remember, I remember everything!
Perhaps bereft of your purifying divine power, we were powerless against the Black Tide and could only let it erode us.
I don't know. When the Black Tide first fell, we conducted extensive research on it, but made no progress.

The Black Tide was originally a medium codenamed Risperdal. We couldn't perceive its existence specifically. But all living things affected by it gradually turned black and died, so we named it the Black Tide.
We only know the Black Tide came from a world beyond the heavens, but its target seemed very clear, always aiming for life forms led by us Angel.
Perhaps you leading us in recreation is the only hope for our civilization's survival.
So, you need the Eye of God, which represents my divinity, to assist in completing the ritual. But separating the Eye of God means I will abandon my mortal form.
Ah, well. Now, I am covered in the Black Tide, no longer my original body... Without the power of the Eye of God, I cannot maintain human form...
...See you tomorrow, Purus Absolutus! May we meet in the promised new world!
It seems you've also lost your memories to the Black Tide... That's right, you are Purus Absolutus, the Pure Angel!
I placed my divinity into [%s] to protect it from the Black Tide's erosion.
The Resonance Stone guided you to retrieve [%s], which allowed my memories to be restored! Purus Absolutus, do you truly remember nothing?
I see... Before helping you regain your memories, tell me what happened. Why did you come here?
...(You tell [%s] about everything that happened before)

So that's it... %s truly persisted until the very end... I never thought you would return with the witch to save the world. Very well. What do you wish to know about the past? I'll answer as best I can.
Your name is Purus Absolutus. You are the Pure Angel, responsible for purifying the darkness of the world. Like us, you are one of the Ten Ruling Council of the World.
A thousand years ago, it was your turn to handle affairs beyond the heavens. But shortly after you left, the Black Tide descended upon the world.
entity.tcrcore.fake_sky_golem.tcrcore.op: What is the Black Tide, really?
entity.tcrcore.ferry_girl.tcrcore.answer: Hello, master. How may I assist you?
Hello, traveler. How may I assist you?

I am the Ferry girl of the Sanctum, ordered by Lady %s to escort you out of the barrier and to that world. I also receive the souls of that world, thus I have collected many of their scattered trinkets and relics. However, you need [%s] to retrieve them from the Primordial Sea. If you have %s, you can also give them to me.
The Warden toils day and night to save the Sanctum. It is truly admirable.
%s's forging skill is unmatched here. I often entrust him with repairing some rare trinkets.

A small gift, I hope you'll accept it. Once this spirit hatches and matures, it can travel thousands of miles a day. I hope it helps you on your journey through the Overworld! §6Come back to me once you've raised it to adulthood.
It seems the little one is getting along well with you! Please accept these gifts! You can check their usage in the compendium. I believe they will bring more fun to your battles!
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer-1: The heat of fire, the toughness of steel—these two things can solve most problems in the world. Master, what is your command?
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer0: The heat of fire, the toughness of steel—these two things can solve most problems in the world.
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer1: I am a demigod, master of forging and craftsmanship, forging divine weapons for the Sanctum. Before the Black Tide came, I thought the weapons I forged were unmatched in the world. Thinking back now... laughable, laughable.
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer2: The Warden is truly unfathomable, but it's best to follow her arrangements.
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer3: That young lady is freer than I am. I can never return to my homeland.
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer4: These were forged from leftover scraps. Take them for self-defense for now.
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer5: God of Forging above! This Armamentarium... records all the high-tier weapons of the world and how to forge them! There are even weapons I've never known!
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer6: This Armamentarium must have been forged by the Earth Angel Montis before the Black Tide descended.
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer7: Leave it to me. I will unveil this exquisite tome for you!
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer8: This is, the legendary %s! You have found such a treasure, traveler!
entity.tcrcore.ornn.tcrcore.answer9: You want me to help you break the seal within? Hmm... I do know a way to unseal it. Once you've gathered the necessary materials, come back to me!
info.tcr.boss_killed_ready_return: §6Boss has been defeated! Block interaction unlocked!
info.tcr.can_not_do_this_too_early: §6You are not destined to do this.
info.tcr.can_not_enter_before_finish: §6You are not destined to enter this cloudland.

info.tcr.enter_dimension_tip: Right-click the altar core to enter the Cloudland
info.tcr.exit_spectator_in_pbf1: Press [%s] to exit Spectator Mode and return to the Sanctum.
info.tcr.get_mimic_invite: [%s]: Otherworldly one, I knew I was right about you! Take this §6[%s§6]§f!
info.tcr.hit_barrier: This area is not available yet. Come back later!
info.tcr.i18n_pack: I18n pack, thanks to all translators!
info.tcr.illegal_item_tip2: §6Currently, you are not destined to use this item.

If bound to the same FTB Party team, all main quest progress will be shared among the team, all choices made in the story will be synchronized across the team, and offline players may miss important items!
info.tcr.kill_arterius: [%s]: Otherworlder, you are indeed formidable! It seems the prophecy is true! Then, I shall bestow these pieces of [%s] upon you!
info.tcr.magic_sword_desc: When playing air attack or dash attack, it will ignore cooldown and mana cost, automatically casting the equipped magic with half level.
info.tcr.map_pos_marked_press_to_open: Labeled location, press [%s] to view the map.
info.tcr.more_beautiful_models_and_trail: Custom 3D weapon trail texture expansion, optional
info.tcr.ocean_tower_breaking: Ocean Tower is answering the Abyss... Please wait.
info.tcr.only_team_leader_can_use: To prevent progress error, only the team leader can use it!
info.tcr.pec_weapon_lock: Weapon skill locked! In [%s] defeat [%s]  to unlock!
info.tcr.pet_respawn: Player death detected, [%s] has respawned in sanctum...
info.tcr.press_to_open_portal_screen2: Click the §6[Scroll]§r in the inventory to return to previously activated stones!
info.tcr.press_to_skill_tree: Sufficient EXP available. Press §6[K]§f to allocate skill points!
info.tcr.reset_when_no_player: If no players remain in the Cloudland, leaving for too long will reset the Cloudland!
info.tcr.resonance_search_failed: [ERROR]：Failed to Resonate! Please retry after restarting the game! Please keep the latest.log and report to the author! [%s]
info.tcr.resonance_stone_usage: Can resonate with the location of the Angel's seal
info.tcr.second_after_boss_die_left: Returning to the Overworld in %d seconds
info.tcr.shift_to_pic: Attack when pressing Shift to pick-up
info.tcr.skill_point_lack: This skill requires %d skill points to unlock
info.tcr.temp_dragon_flute: [Temporary Dragon Flute]: It will be consumed after use!
info.tcr.time_to_altar: The scattered embers have been found. It's time to return and light-up the altars...
info.tcr.time_to_ask_godness_statue: §d*This item can be used at the statue of the Goddess.
info.tcr.time_to_end: All altars are lit. It's time to find the The Sanctuary Keeper to perform the ritual...
info.tcr.to_be_continue2: [P1nero]: §6Thank you for playing! More bosses are in the making, stay tuned for more!
info.tcr.tudigong_gift_get: §6[TuDi]§f: I have grown old and incapable, so Ill pass this treasure to you！
info.tcr.unlock_new_dim_girl: §6New options unlocked at the Ferry girl!§r
info.tcr.unlock_new_ftb_page: A new quest page has been unlocked. Please open the §6[Quest Book]§r to check
info.tcr.unlock_new_skill_page: A new skill book interface has been unlocked!
info.tcr.use_true_eye_tip: Please use [%s] to right-click the altar core
info.tcr.weapon_innate_charge_tutorial: §6[Perfect Dodge]§c or §6[Perfect Parry]§c can charge certain weapons!
info.tcr.weapon_no_interact: Cannot interact! Please press [%s] vanilla mode or other item.
info.tcr.yamato_skill_lock: [%s] are locked. Requires special enchantment book to unlock!
item.cataclysm.chitin_claw.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §3[Giant Claw Guard]§r in the §3cloudland of Scylla§r
item.cataclysm.coral_chunk.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §a[Coral Colossus]§r in the §dcloudland of The Leviathan§r
It allows for special enchantments to be applied to pets.
item.efn.deepdark_heart.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §2[Warden]§r or §2[Captain Cornelia]§r
item.epicskills.ability_stone.tcr_info: Right-click to use and gain skill points
item.tcrcore.artifact_ticket.usage: Obtained from certain quests in the quest book. Can be used to refine artifact with the §3[Ferry girl]§r at the §d[Saint Harbor]§r
item.tcrcore.blood_lotus.usage: High-tier material. Can upgrade certain basic weapons into high-tier weapons.
item.tcrcore.core_flint.usage: Use on an Obsidian Frame to open a Nether Portal.
item.tcrcore.divine_fragment.usage: It records the will of the gods.
item.tcrcore.dragon_flute.usage: Right-click to capture a dragon; right-click again to release it.
item.tcrcore.dual_bokken.usage: I may have skill issue but I'm not lacking on dedication so do you lacking in dedication?
item.tcrcore.magic_bottle.usage: Restores a certain percentage of mana when used. Once depleted, must be used in the Sanctum to replenish MP.
item.tcrcore.mysterious_weapons.usage: It seems to record all manner of weapons from around the world. You should show it to someone who knows about such things.
item.tcrcore.necromancy_scroll.usage: It seems to hold the secrets of magic within. Show it to someone who understands it.
item.tcrcore.netherite_fragment: Embers of the Quenched Molten Heart
item.tcrcore.nine_heaven_darksteel.usage: High-tier material. Can upgrade certain basic weapons into high-tier weapons.
item.tcrcore.proof_of_adventure.usage: Forged from the names of all foes vanquished by your blade. Your journey has reached its end, and your courage is now legend.
item.tcrcore.rare_artifact_ticket.usage: Obtained from certain quests in the quest book. Can be used to refine rare artifact with the §3[Ferry girl]§r at the §d[Saint Harbor]§r
item.tcrcore.reset_skill_stone.usage: After use, it will reset all skills in the skill tree and refund the points, very precious!
item.tcrcore.retracement_stone.usage: After use, it will clear all entities in [%s] !
item.tcrcore.soul_fragment: Dust of the Cursed Bone Prison
item.tcrcore.stone_of_reincarnation.usag: After use, you will return to the beginning of the journey.
item.tcrcore.void_core.usage: Dropped by the [Ender Guardian] when defeated
item.tcrcore.wither_soul_stone.usage: It seems to have lost its magic for now, just a unique stone. Figure out how to reawaken it!
item.tcrcore.wither_soul_stone_activated: Can open a gateway to the §6[Infinite Samsara]§r.
item.waystones.warp_stone.tcr_info: Click the §6[Scroll]§r button in the inventory to teleport to activated waystones!
itemGroup.tcr.items: The Casket of Reveries — Core Items
screen.tcrcore.ans.first_enter_cloudland: Where is this? It looks like another world.
I should be able to leave here using a [%s] or the [teleport scroll] in my inventory. Once I'm out, I'll ask %s what's going on.
screen.tcrcore.ans.reset_game_0: Are you sure you want to reset all game progress? Resetting progress will retain all item data and only reset all task progress. Additionally, in single-player mode, all monsters will be enhanced!
screen.tcrcore.ans.reset_game_1: §4Are you absolutely sure? This action cannot be undone!
screen.tcrcore.ans.start_screen_0: %s! %s! (You keep repeating this name over and over.)
screen.tcrcore.ans.start_screen_1: What is this place? Such a grand sanctuary! Let’s go inside and take a look—maybe %s is waiting for me in there.
skill.tcrcore.perfect_dodge.tooltip: Play a cool animation when perfect dodge!
skill.tcrcore.regen_mana.tooltip: After a perfect dodge or perfect parry, restore %d%% of max mana!
skill_tree.sword_soaring.unlock_tip: Unlocked by Advancing the main quest
tcrcore.ponder.falchion_art.text_1: Use different skills with direction keys
tcrcore.ponder.falchion_art.text_3: Left/Right + Skill: Fast slash with full super armor
tcrcore.ponder.falchion_art.text_4: Backward + Skill: Sweeping slash combo that can knock down enemies
tcrcore.ponder.falchion_art.title: Skill
tcrcore.quest.bless_on_the_godness_statu: [The Eye of God] has been retrieved. By using the goddess statue in the garden, we can resonate with the Eye of God and gain power from the Angel.
tcrcore.quest.bone_chimera_quest.desc:
[%s] seems to have marked another location. Perhaps there’s an unexpected adventure there. Hurry and check it out!

§a[Quest Reward]: §f[%s§f]
tcrcore.quest.bone_chimera_quest.title: Weapon Chapter
tcrcore.quest.find_helmet_in_ocean_monum: [%s] tells us that the item to summon [%s] is hidden in the treasure within [%s]! Go find it inside [%s]!
As the ancient inscription on the resonance stone says, to activate [%s], you need to obtain [%s]. The first one is scattered in [%s]. Go to [%s], defeat the guardian of [%s]: [%s], and retrieve [%s]!
As the ancient inscription on the resonance stone says, to activate [%s], you need to obtain [%s]. The second one is scattered in [%s]. Go to [%s], defeat the guardian of [%s]: [%s], and retrieve [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.get_cursed_eye.desc:
[%s] has marked the scattered locations of [%s]. Set out to retrieve [%s]!

§a[Hint]: §fExplore to find clues to summon [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.get_cursed_eye.title: Soul Chapter
tcrcore.quest.get_desert_eye.desc:
[%s] has marked the scattered locations of [%s]. Set out to retrieve [%s]!

§a[Hint]: Explore the tower to find the key to summon the boss! Note that [%s§a] may be hidden within blocks!

§4[Note]: If you cannot complete the quest after obtaining it, try disabling any plugins that might automatically pick up items, then drop and re-pick up the item!
tcrcore.quest.get_desert_eye.title: Earth Chapter
tcrcore.quest.get_flame_eye.desc:
[%s] has marked the scattered locations of [%s]. Set out to retrieve [%s]!

§a[Hint]: §f[%s] may be hidden in an underground tower. You’ll need the power to break through the obsidian barrier!
tcrcore.quest.get_flame_eye.title: Flame Chapter
tcrcore.quest.get_monst_eye.desc:
[%s] has marked the scattered locations of [%s]. Set out to retrieve [%s]!

§a[Hint]: It is recommended to equip [%s]
tcrcore.quest.get_monst_eye.title: Nether Chapter
As the ancient inscription on the resonance stone says, to activate [%s], you need to obtain [%s]. The first one is scattered in [%s]. Hint: Craft [%s] to summon the guardian of [%s] - [%s], and take back [%s]!
As the ancient inscription on the resonance stone says, to activate [%s], you need to obtain [%s]. The second one is scattered in [%s]. Go to [%s] and defeat the guardian of [%s] - [%s], and take back [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.get_ocean_eye.desc:
[%s] has marked the scattered locations of [%s]. Set out to retrieve [%s]!

§a[Hint]: [%s§a] may be hidden within blocks!

§4[Note]: If you cannot complete the quest after obtaining it, try disabling any plugins that might automatically pick up items, then drop and re-pick up the item!
tcrcore.quest.get_ocean_eye.title: Ocean Chapter
tcrcore.quest.get_storm_eye.desc: [%s] has marked the scattered locations of [%s]. Set out to retrieve [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.get_storm_eye.title: Sky Chapter
tcrcore.quest.get_void_eye.desc: [%s] is in [%s]. Do your best to retrieve it!
tcrcore.quest.get_void_eye.title: Final Chapter
tcrcore.quest.get_wither_eye.desc: Research on the echoes of the Ship Graveyard has progressed! We must perform an ancient ritual to summon the Angel of Death! Hurry and follow %s's instructions to summon [%s] and retrieve [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.get_wither_eye.title: Destruction Chapter
tcrcore.quest.give_amethyst_block_to_rib:
It seems that to learn more about [%s], you’ll need to make a deal with the %s. Gather 12 [%s] and return to them!

§a[Quest Reward]: §f[%s] [%s]

§6[Recommended to complete first]
tcrcore.quest.go_to_aether.desc: Water the frame built by %s with the source of life (%s) to open the gates of heaven!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_aether.title: Sky Chapter
tcrcore.quest.go_to_nether.desc: All the Eyes of God scattered in [%s] have been retrieved. The Resonance Stone may not work in [%s]. As %s said, use [%s] to ignite the obsidian frame and open %s!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_nether.title: Nether Chapter
tcrcore.quest.go_to_overworld_core.desc: [%s] has finished charging. It’s time to go to [%s] and use it! It will guide us to the location of [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_overworld_core.title: Flame Chapter
tcrcore.quest.go_to_overworld_cursed.des: You unexpectedly obtained the scattered location of [%s] from [%s]. Hurry to [%s] to retrieve it! [%s] will guide us to its location.
tcrcore.quest.go_to_overworld_end.desc: %s said that the final Eye of God is located in [%s]. We need to find the [%s] leading to [%s] in [%s] to open the gate to [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_overworld_end.title: Final Chapter
tcrcore.quest.go_to_overworld_ocean.desc: [%s] has finished charging. It’s time to go to [%s] and use it! It will guide us to the location of [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_samsara.desc: What secrets lie within [%s]? Hurry and follow %s's instructions to activate [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_samsara.title: Cycle Chapter
tcrcore.quest.go_to_the_end.desc: [%s] has guided us to the location of [%s]. Now, find a way to reach [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.go_to_the_end.title: Final Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_abyss_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Craft [%s] and use it to awaken the sleeping [%s].
tcrcore.quest.kill_abyss_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_cursed_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Defeat mini-bosses to obtain [%s], then you can open the door deep in the maze and challenge [%s]!
tcrcore.quest.kill_cursed_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_desert_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Defeat mini-bosses to obtain [%s] and use them to awaken [%s] in the deepest part of the pyramid maze. Keep moving downward!
tcrcore.quest.kill_desert_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_flame_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Defeat mini-bosses to obtain [%s], then summon [%s] at the altar.
tcrcore.quest.kill_flame_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_mad_chronos.desc: A massive monster has appeared. Do your best to defeat Him!
tcrcore.quest.kill_mad_chronos.title: Final Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_mech_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Use [%s] to awaken [%s] sleeping deep in the factory.
tcrcore.quest.kill_mech_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_monst_eye.desc: With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!
tcrcore.quest.kill_monst_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_storm_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Interact with [%s] at the top to awaken [%s].
tcrcore.quest.kill_storm_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.kill_void_eye.desc:
With the power of [%s], we have opened a new cloudland. Defeat the cloudland boss [%s] to obtain powerful materials!

§a[Hint]:§r Keep moving downward! [%s] is waiting for you deep in the fortress.
tcrcore.quest.kill_void_eye.title: Cloudland Chapter
tcrcore.quest.put_abyss_eye_on_altar.des: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_cursed_eye_on_altar.de: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_desert_eye_on_altar.de: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_flame_eye_on_altar.des: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_mech_eye_on_altar.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_monst_eye_on_altar.des: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_storm_eye_on_altar.des: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.put_void_eye_on_altar.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry and return it to the altar in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.ribbits_quest.desc:
[%s] seems to have marked another location. Perhaps there’s an unexpected adventure there. Hurry and check it out!

§a[Quest Reward]: §f[%s] [%s]

§6[Recommended to complete first]
tcrcore.quest.ribbits_quest.title: Ocean Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_0.desc: You agreed to come to this world with %s, but when you came to your senses, %s was nowhere to be found. Hurry and look for her in the Sanctum! You vaguely remember her saying she had a new outfit to give you.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_0.title: Prologue
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_1.desc: You’ve retrieved half of the Eyes of God on your journey. Talk to %s!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_1.title: Interlude
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_2.desc: [%s] has been retrieved, and its story has been understood... Talk to %s.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_2.title: Sky Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_cloudland.des: When you touched the altar, you were drawn into a mysterious world. Perhaps we should call it the Cloudland. Go talk to %s; maybe she knows what this place is.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_echo.desc: %s doesn’t know the origin of [%s] either. Go ask %s! Perhaps the archives hold records, and with magic, you can decipher its secrets.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_echo.title: Soul Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_game_clear.de: Have you truly understood [The Casket of Reveries]?
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_magic.desc: [%s] dropped a mysterious %s. Perhaps %s, who understands magic, can decipher its secrets!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_magic.title: Magic Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_magic_2.desc: You’ve learned how to infuse spells into your weapon. Go talk to %s! She will teach you how to use magic effectively!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_magic_2.title: Magic Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_samsara.desc: %s told us that [%s] is the key to opening [%s]. What secrets does [%s] hold? Hurry and ask %s!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_aine_samsara.title: Interlude
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_bountiful_villager: We have finally arrived at [%s]! Several unique buildings seem to be scattered around the village center. Let's go take a look! Perhaps we can pick up some decent commissions there!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_1.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_1.title: Earth Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_10.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_10.title: Destruction Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_11.desc: After a long wait, %s has finished charging. Hurry back to %s! She’s waiting for you in the Sanctum.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_11.title: Sky Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_12.desc: [%s] has been retrieved, and its story has been understood... Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_12.title: Sky Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_2.desc: After a long wait, %s has finished charging. Hurry back to %s! She’s waiting for you in the Sanctum.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_2.title: Ocean Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_3.desc:
[%s] has been retrieved. Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.

This time, we also retrieved [%s]. What secrets does it hold? Ask her while you’re at it!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_3.title: Ocean Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_4.desc: %s has finished deciphering [%s]. Now, go tell %s the news!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_4.title: Soul Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_5.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_5.title: Soul Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_6.desc: After a long wait, %s has finished charging. Hurry back to %s! She’s waiting for you in the Sanctum.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_6.title: Flame Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_7.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_7.title: Flame Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_8.desc: After a long wait, %s has finished charging. Hurry back to %s! She’s waiting for you in the Sanctum.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_8.title: Nether Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_9.desc: [%s] has been retrieved. Hurry back to the Sanctum to report to %s! She will tell us what to do next.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_9.title: Nether Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_end.desc: [%s] has been retrieved... You’ve finally collected all 8 Eyes of God. It’s time to prepare for the re-creation ritual.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_chronos_end.title: Final Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_col_0.desc: You agreed to come to this world with %s, but when you came to your senses, %s was nowhere to be found. What is this place? Try talking to the dignified woman in the Sanctum corridor!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_col_0.title: Prologue
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ferry_girl_0.desc: You’ve heard the story of this world. When you’re ready, head to the dock to find %s! She will open the path to [%s] for us! She also seems to have some treasure to give you.
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ferry_girl_0.title: Prologue
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ornn_0.desc: On %s's suggestion, go to the armory to equip yourself with %s! Proper equipment will ensure a smooth adventure!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ornn_0.title: Prologue
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ornn_1.desc: You obtained [%s] from [%s]. What secrets does it hold? Take it back to the Sanctum and show it to %s!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ornn_1.title: Weapon Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ornn_yamato.desc: You unexpectedly obtained [%s], but its power seems not fully released. Hurry and talk to %s! Perhaps there’s a way to restore its power!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_ornn_yamato.title: Weapon Chapter
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_sky_golem.desc: %s seems... not entirely dissipated. It appears to have regained consciousness. Try talking to %s!
tcrcore.quest.talk_to_sky_golem.title: Sky Chapter
tcrcore.quest.tame_dragon.desc:
%s gave you a dragon. Now, follow the method described in [%s] to raise it to adulthood! You can feed your dragon any foods!

§a[Quest Reward]: §f[%s] [%s]
tcrcore.quest.tame_dragon.title: Dragon-Taming Chapter
tcrcore.quest.tame_dragon_back_to_ferry_:
With your careful care, the dragon has grown to adulthood. %s mentioned earlier that she would give us a treasure once the dragon is grown. Hurry back to %s to see!

§a[Quest Reward]: §f[%s] [%s]
tcrcore.quest.try_to_learn_magic.desc:
[%s] has revealed the magic of this world. Now, follow %s's instructions and try infusing the spell from the scroll into your weapon!

§a[Hint]: %s has new dialogue options!
tcrcore.quest.try_to_learn_magic.title: Magic Chapter
tcrcore.quest.use_aether_resonance_stone: On your journey to collect the Eyes of God, only the eyes of the Sky Angel and the Void Angel remain to be retrieved...
tcrcore.quest.use_core_resonance_stone.d: You’ve arrived at [%s]. Hurry and use [%s]! It will guide us to the location of [%s]! What adventures await us?
tcrcore.quest.use_cursed_resonance_stone: You unexpectedly obtained the scattered location of [%s] from [%s]. Hurry to [%s] to retrieve it! [%s] will guide us to its location.
tcrcore.quest.use_end_resonance_stone.de: We need to find the [%s] leading to [%s] in [%s] to open the gate to [%s]! The Resonance Stone will guide us to the location of [%s].
tcrcore.quest.use_land_resonance_stone.d: You’ve finally arrived at the legendary [%s]. What adventures await here? Hurry and use [%s]! It will guide us to retrieve the first eye.
tcrcore.quest.use_nether_resonance_stone: You’ve arrived at [%s]. Hurry and use [%s]! It will guide us to the location of [%s]! What adventures await us?
You’ve arrived at [%s]. Hurry and use [%s]! It will guide us to the location of [%s]! What adventures await us?
tcrcore.quest.wait_resonance_stone_charg: [%s]'s energy has been depleted, and recharging will take some time. Before it finishes charging, go do something else!
unlock_tip.epicskills.prodigy.critical_k: You are not destined to do this
unlock_tip.epicskills.prodigy.lethal_foc: You are not destined to do this
unlock_tip.tcrcore.battleborn.fire_avoid: Unlocked by Advancing the main quest
unlock_tip.tcrcore.battleborn.water_avoi: Learned by trading with §6[Ribbit]§f using §d[Block of Amethyst]§f
